perks.summary: extract text/markdown from a .pptx via markitdown (read-only)
render a labeled JPEG thumbnail grid of all slides (read-only)
convert a .pptx to PDF via headless LibreOffice (read-only)
unpack a .pptx into a pretty-printed XML directory for editing
pack an unpacked XML directory back into a .pptx (with validation + auto-repair)
add a slide to an unpacked dir by duplicating a slide or instantiating a layout
remove unreferenced/orphaned files from an unpacked .pptx directory
validate an unpacked dir or .pptx against OOXML XSD schemas (read-only)
